Please read the contribution guidelines before contributing.

Introduction

Overview

  • Fregestars3.4k - Official website.

First Steps

  • Getting Started - First steps with Frege on the command line.
  • Examples - Some code examples.
  • Templatestars3 - Template for Frege projects.
  • Trending - Trending projects on GitHub.

Comparisons

  • Frege vs. Haskell - Differences between Frege and Haskell.
  • Frege vs. Scala - Differences between Scala and Frege.

Official Resources

  • Language Reference - Description of the language and its implementation.
  • Standard Library API - Frege API documentation.
  • Java Runtime API - Java API documentation.
  • FAQ - Frequently asked questions.
  • Wiki - Official wiki.
  • Changelog - Official changelog.

Community

Chat

  • Gitter - Gitter channel.
  • IRC - IRC channel.

Questions

  • Google Group - Frege Google Group.
  • Stack Overflow - Frege tag on Stack Overflow.

Social Media

  • Twitter - Official Twitter account.
  • reddit - Frege subreddit.
  • Dierk König - Core contributor and Groovy expert.

Information

Articles & Blogs

  • InfoQ - InfoQ article on Frege.
  • Frege Wiki - List of more articles on the Frege wiki.
  • Frege Programming Language - Blog of Ingo Wechsung.
  • JAXenter - Interview with Ingo Wechsung (German).

Books

  • Frege Goodness - Book by Dierk König.
  • Frege Quick Reference - Book by Ingo Wechsung.
  • Learn You a Frege for Great Good!stars49 - Frege adaptation of Learn You a Haskell for Great Good!.
  • Frege Wiki - List of more books on the Frege wiki.

Conferences

  • ICFP - International Conference on Functional Programming.

Courses

  • FP101x - Introduction to Functional Programming on edX.

Talks

  • Overview - Frege, a Haskell for the JVM by Dierk König.
  • Frege vs. Haskell - FregeDay: Roadmap for resolving differences between Haskell and Frege (Ingo Wechsung).
  • ICFP Videos - Videos about functional programming.
  • Frege Wiki - List of more talks on the Frege wiki.

Libraries

  • Frege Wiki - List of libraries on the Frege wiki.

Android

  • FregeAndroidstars14 - Frege interface to the Android API.
  • frege-on-androidstars1 - How to use Frege on Android.
  • FregeAndroidstars6 - Proof of concept Android application in Frege.
  • GeoQuiz-Fregestars11 - Port of the BigNerd Ranch GeoQuiz application in Frege.
  • froidstars100 - Library for using Frege in Android development.

Big Data

  • Sparkstars5 - Apache Spark with Frege.

Databases

  • Siroccostars15 - Frege library for relational databases.
  • frege-dbcstars3 - JDBC with Frege.

Email

  • Frege Emailstars1 - SMTP library for Frege.

Graphics

  • Frege-RayTracerstars4 - Ray tracer in Frege.

GUI

  • FregeFXstars29 - Frege bindings for JavaFX.

Web Frameworks

  • Chinookstars27 - Frege web framework based on SparkJava.
  • Fregeletstars6 - Frege web framework based on servlet.
  • Playstars19 - Play framework with Frege.

Sample Applications

Games

  • 2048stars4 - Frege clone of 2048.
  • frechstars0 - Fully functional chess engine.

Media

  • Zwanastars4 - Piano using Java Midi.

Web

  • RESTful Todo Managerstars5 - Task list manager written in Frege.
  • Play Frameworkstars19 - Play application written in Frege.
  • Fervorstars0 - Server for local directories.

Tools

Build Tools

  • Leiningen - Project automation for Frege and Clojure.
  • Leiningen Templatestars8 - Template for frege-lein projects.
  • gottlobstars0 - Build tool for Frege.

IDEs

  • fregIDE - Eclipse plugin for Frege.
  • intellij-fregestars14 - Frege support for IntelliJ IDEA.
  • frege-idea-pluginstars21 - Language support for Frege in IntelliJ IDEA.

REPLs

  • Console REPLstars73 - REPL on the console.
  • GUI REPLstars22 - GUI based REPL.

Unit Testing

  • FrUnitstars1 - JUnit for Frege.
